prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年该科类最低位次分别为约 8171→8239→7554→7783→8389 名，整体呈波动上升趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 835 名；2025 年基准位次约 8389 名；该校在贵州省理科组招生计划 2021 年 15 人、2022–2023 年 16 人、2024 年 37 人、2025 年 44 人，呈持续扩招态势；2026 年计划 53 人，较 2025 年扩招约 20.5%，计划增幅显著，理论上对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 28 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 28–32 区间，学校层次稳固；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音综合热度排名第 55 位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；依托大连理工大学主体，化学工程与技术 A+、力学 A、土木工程 A、工商管理 A、机械工程 A、环境科学与工程 A-、软件工程 A 等，盘锦校区开设的能源化学工程、经济学类等专业直接对应上述优势学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程（对应化学工程与技术 A+）属传统工科，社会热度平稳；经济学类（对应工商管理 A）属财经大类，近年社会热度分化观望；海洋技术、生物制造、智能海洋装备等新兴专业关注度逐步上升。贵州省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 29.9 万人，较 2025 年物理类 20.7 万人大幅增长约 44%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；在贵州省招生计划近年持续增加，2026 年已达 53 人，表明该校对贵州生源重视程度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上行趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招（+20.5%）与贵州省考生总数激增（+44%）的供需对冲，以及学校声誉偏负面带来的有限抑制，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 8389 名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约 9388 名，区间 8888–9888 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程
- 经济学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能海洋装备
- 生物制造。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 海洋技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8888–9888 名内，建议以二档专业（智能海洋装备、生物制造）为主攻方向，一档专业（能源化学工程、经济学类）作为冲刺，三档专业（海洋技术）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<8888 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 8171→8239→7554→7783→8389, showing a fluctuating upward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 835 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8389; the university's enrollment plan for science groups in Guizhou Province was 15 in 2021, 16 in 2022–2023, 37 in 2024, and 44 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 53, an increase of about 20.5% compared to 2025, with a significant planned increase, theoretically alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 28th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (2026), with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving signals of admission gaps or abnormal submission lines, which may suppress some candidates' application psychology; ranked 55th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; no obvious admission gap records; relying on the main body of Dalian University of Technology, with A+ in Chemical Engineering and Technology, A in Mechanics, A in Civil Engineering, A in Business Administration, A in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Environmental Science and Engineering, A in Software Engineering, etc. The Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering and Economics, directly corresponding to the above advantageous disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Energy Chemical Engineering (corresponding to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+) is a traditional engineering field with stable social popularity; Economics (corresponding to Business Administration A) belongs to the finance and economics category, with divided and wait-and-see social popularity in recent years; emerging majors such as Marine Technology, Bio-manufacturing, and Intelligent Marine Equipment are gradually gaining attention. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, a significant increase of about 44% compared to 207,000 in the physics category in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, not a local university, with no local enrollment bias; the enrollment plan in Guizhou Province has been increasing in recent years, reaching 53 in 2026, indicating the university's increased emphasis on Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (+20.5%), the surge in the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province (+44%) as a supply-demand offset, and the limited suppression from the slightly negative university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly downward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 8389, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 9388, in the range of 8888–9888.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8888–9888, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Marine Equipment, Bio-manufacturing) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Energy Chemical Engineering, Economics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Marine Technology) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8888), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
